ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seismic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic event */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Code for the seismic station that detected the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the event detection */,
  "polarity" TEXT /* Polarity of the seismic signal */,
  "evaluation_mode" TEXT /* Evaluation mode used for the event (manual or automated) */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the seismic wave */,
  "azimuth" INTEGER /* Azimuth of the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the seismic station */,
  "takeoff_angle" INTEGER /* Takeoff angle of the seismic wave */,
  "residual" REAL /* Residual value of the event */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight assigned to the event for further analysis */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of seismic event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event data */,
  "event_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_events_station_code FOREIGN KEY ("station_code") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the seismic station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the seismic station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the seismic station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the seismic station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the seismic station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_characteristics" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic event */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the event */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the event */,
  "epicenter" TEXT /* Location of the epicenter */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the seismic event in seconds */,
  "source_depth_error" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the depth of the event */,
  "magnitude_type" TEXT /* Type of magnitude measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact assessment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the event */,
  "potential_damage" TEXT /* Potential damage caused by the event */,
  "affected_population" INTEGER /* Estimated number of people affected by the event */,
  "affected_area" TEXT /* Area affected by the event */,
  "economic_impact" REAL /* Estimated economic impact of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_impact_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_recipients" TEXT /* List of recipients who received the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team responding to the event */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was initiated */,
  "response_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the team */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response */,
  "response_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the response action */,
  "response_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_responses_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_responses_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback */,
  "feedback_followup" TEXT /* Follow-up actions taken based on the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality assessment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Strength of the seismic signal */,
  "noise_level" REAL /* Level of noise in the seismic signal */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the data quality */,
  "quality_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the data quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data processing step */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "processing_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the processing occurred */,
  "processing_steps" TEXT /* Description of the processing steps */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the processing */,
  "processing_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the processing in seconds */,
  "processing_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., waveform, spectrogram) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization */,
  "visualization_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., peak amplitude, frequency) */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "statistic_source" TEXT /* Source of the statistic */,
  "statistic_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)
